prerequisites: An Easypromos account on a White Label or Corporate plan, since the REST API is only available to those tiers.
An API access token generated from the account, which is passed as the connector's required bearer_token field.

authMethods.name: Bearer token
authMethods.summary: The Easypromos API uses HTTP Bearer token authentication. Requests must include an Authorization: Bearer <token> header, and a request without a valid token returns a 401 Unauthorized error. Provide this token as the connector's bearer_token field.

setupSteps.title: Confirm your plan supports the API
setupSteps.body: Verify your Easypromos account is on a White Label or Corporate plan. The REST API and access tokens are only available to clients on those tiers.

setupSteps.title: Generate an access token
setupSteps.body: In your Easypromos account, go to Settings > Integrations > Developers and create a new token. You can name the token for identification and set its duration; tokens default to 30 days and can be extended up to one year. The token can access the White Label promotions linked to the account that created it.

setupSteps.title: Provide the token to the connector
setupSteps.body: Copy the generated token and set it as the connector's required bearer_token field. The connector sends it as Authorization: Bearer <token> against the Easypromos API (https://api.easypromosapp.com/v2).

sources.title: Getting started with the Easypromos REST API
How to obtain an access token
